SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_LTCP_COINS_G_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was populated only in 2013. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit 
design with extra coverage in the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial 
coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit.
